# Project Context Instructions

Use [BASE_CONTEXT.md](../BASE_CONTEXT.md) as the primary context source for this repository.

Guidelines:

- Read [BASE_CONTEXT.md](../BASE_CONTEXT.md) before proposing architecture, implementation details, or task plans.
- Align terminology, course structure, and examples with the content defined in [BASE_CONTEXT.md](../BASE_CONTEXT.md).
- If there is any conflict between ad-hoc notes and [BASE_CONTEXT.md](../BASE_CONTEXT.md), prioritize [BASE_CONTEXT.md](../BASE_CONTEXT.md).
- When adding new project documentation, keep it consistent with [BASE_CONTEXT.md](../BASE_CONTEXT.md).
